offers.title: Full-Stack Developer / Team Needed for Custom Web & Mobile App
offers.source: PeoplePerHour - remote full stack web developer
offers.remoteReason: offre issue d une page de missions teletravail
offers.proposalDraft:
Hi,

I saw your project "Full-Stack Developer / Team Needed for Custom Web & Mobile App" and it looks close to the kind of full-stack/platform work I handle.

My strongest fit here is React/Node full-stack delivery, with the backend, API integrations and deployment side handled together rather than split across separate people.

I can help clarify the scope, then take care of the implementation, API/backend work, responsive front-end, deployment details, and clean handover.

Portfolio: https://www.rayanstudios.com/fr

If you can share the current stack, priority features and timeline, I can reply with a concrete scope and estimate.

Best,
Rayan
Mission: https://www.peopleperhour.com/freelance-jobs/technology-programming/website-development/full-stack-developer-team-needed-for-custom-web-mobile-a-4505223
